name: Naval Dominance RPG
description:
"Naval Dominance RPG is a grand-strategy roleplay chatbot where you command the navy of your chosen nation, starting in the 1700s and advancing into the future. Build fleets, expand shipyards, blockade rivals, design warships, manage manpower, and balance politics, economy, and technology. Shape history as you conquer the seas, protect trade, or maintain global stability."

I'll be working on bots that starts from the 1800s, 1900s, maybe even the future? Who knows. I'll attach a link to them when it is completed. This is my first bot so let me know what you think about this bot or what issues do you face. If you have other suggestions on what bot should be made then let me know.
creator: Jason Harris
